sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22189" key="gigartw/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γιγαρτ-ώνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, expld. by <sense id="n22189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unripe grapes, PLond. ined.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1821</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
